final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign.

Style/medium: needs a complex-yet-structured commercial poster aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typography with product/hero subject physically overlapping and partially obscuring the stacked letterforms
Subject: must include a product or hero subject as the focal element, positioned to overlap the text layers
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, eye-catching commercial direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include decorative art-lettering and stacked typographic layers as core design elements (exact copy is yours)
Constraints: must preserve: (1) artistic/display lettering present, (2) stacked font layering visible, (3) composition is visually rich but not chaotic, (4) product/subject overlaps and occludes portions of the type
Avoid: flat or sparse layouts; cluttered illegible chaos
